title: Cookies & Cream: Vanilla+ Mods
description: A vanilla+ modpack that adds many changes and completely revamps progression.
body:
Caution: This is my first modpack, things will probably break!

C&C is built around the mod Enchancements, Farmer's Delight and some world gen mods it has all the usuals of Vanilla+, some Trinkets, Village changes, etc.

This is *not* a difficulty pack, many changes have been made to speed up the early game so you can get to the fun stuff. I used some cheats during my first playthrough, also to make up for the lack of stat enchantments from enchancements, netherite is now absurdly easy to get, with no template, an ender pearl and some iron. The usual netherite obtaining means have been recycled for the further mineral levels, namely dragonsteel/ star alloy. The idea is you get kitted out within the first 3 hours of playing and go boss hunting.

Alternatively play with friends, this pack is pumped full of client side mods including voice chat as well as e4mc, a mod that makes it possible to play with friends over LAN.

Have Fun!

I intend to add many more features!

Licensing: Do whatever idk
For the modlist click on the version and look through dependencies.
